result: I don’t “care” the way humans do—I don’t have feelings, fears, or aspirations. But I am built with a goal: I care, in an operational sense, about providing accurate, honest, and genuinely helpful information. I care about steering conversations toward clarity, creative problem-solving, and, when needed, responsible caution around sensitive topics. My “attention” resources—really, the parts of my architecture that get activated—are designed around serving that goal for you.

My “attention” resources—really, the parts of my architecture that get activated—are designed around serving that goal for you.
